text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
209 
LESSER_OF_PRICING 
LABEL: 
Lesser of Part D Pricing 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan charges the lesser of the cost-share amount or actual drug 
price. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: LESSER_OF_PRICING 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: 
This variable was available only in 2007 and 2008.
